## 2. Modified Files
- Pure additions extending the base `packages/` directory structures for intelligence and hyperscale namespaces.

## 3. New AI Orchestration Systems
1. **Predictive Scaling:** Pre-warming serverless pods ahead of scheduled heavy operations natively via ML curve analysis.
2. **Operations Telemetry:** LLM integration interpreting raw security matrices into boardroom-ready plain text explanations.

## 4. New Hyperscale Protections
1. **Queue Hot-Routing:** Moving white-hot tenant bursts into custom isolated partitions automatically.
2. **Snapshot Event Truncation:** Resolving tail-lag by compiling massive aggregate histories into compact V-Last snapshots.

## 5. New Operational Intelligence Systems
1. **Margin Analytics:** Real-time analysis of computation unit burn across single tenant lines.
2. **Execution Telemetry:** Monte-carlo style estimations of Deal completion via Outbox cadence intervals.

## 6. New Self-Healing Optimizations
1. **Auto-indexing DB Engine:** Finding and repairing SeqScan anomalies over heavily hit read model projections dynamically.
2. **Stuck-Pod Eviction:** Autonomously evicting and wiping locked execution nodes without waiting for manual human pager interaction.

## 7. Unresolved Hyperscale Risks
- Edge latency vs true global data consistency synchronization bounds without dedicated cross-continent fiber backplanes constrains absolute sub-100ms commit speeds.

## 8. Remaining Blockers Before World-Scale Operational Deployment
1. Enterprise Key Management alignment with end-to-end Wasm sandboxes.
2. Formalization of multi-tenant capacity reservation contracts across hyperscalers.
